name: Red Tomato Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
This marmalade is very tart; it is especially good with ham.
1. Put the tomatoes in boiling water for 2 minutes. Remove from the water and skin them. Cut into quarters.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to a saucepan. Bring to a slow boil, stirring frequently until thickened.
3. Pour into sterilized jars or bottles and seal.
Makes 1 pint.
